types.trigger: step missing precondition or validation predicate
no eligible branch resolves from current context
concept reused across products without canonical owner

rules: ambiguity is named, not silently resolved
destructive decisions never proceed under ambiguity
ambiguity must select between: ask-disambiguation, withhold, or escalate
default behavior under ambiguity = the safest of the three
every ambiguity event is recorded for knowledge-health intake
OEM-confirmation is the only resolver for verified-truth conflicts on P0 procedures

resolution_paths.when: destructive OR irrecoverable OR conflicting verified-truth
resolution_paths.effect: hand off to higher tier or OEM
